CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleKeyDownEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local key = event.key local option = {["SyncFlip"] = true, ["Color"] = Color(0, 0, 255, 1)}
if key == KeyboardKey.LeftArrow or key == KeyboardKey.RightArrow then --_EffectService:PlayEffectAttached("cba42a77a12e48059240908f043a86d8", self.Entity, Vector3(0, 0, 0), 0, Vector3(1, 1, 1), false, option) local dash = _EffectService:PlayEffectAttached("cba42a77a12e48059240908f043a86d8", self.Entity, Vector3(0, 0, 0), 0, Vector3(1, 1, 1), true, option) self.serial = dash end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleKeyUpEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local key = event.key local option = {["SyncFlip"] = true, ["Color"] = Color(0, 0, 255, 1)}
if key == KeyboardKey.LeftArrow or key == KeyboardKey.RightArrow then _EffectService:RemoveEffect(self.serial) end
